DECLARATION OF BJORN SKARLEN FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LIMITED

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LIMITED'S MOTION TO QUASH FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. (CCP 416.10.) PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT MINIMUM CONTACTS EXIST BETWEEN DEFENDANT COMMERCE GATE IRELAND LIMITED ("DEFENDANT") AND THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. (CCP 410.10.) ON ITS WEBSITE, DEFENDANT IDENTIFIED AN OFFICE LOCATED AT 501 SANTA MONICA BLVD., STE. 506, SANTA MONICA, CA 90401. (YAPORT DECL., EXHIBIT A.) FURTHER, BY ITS OWN ADMISSION, DEFENDANT PERMITTED OTHER PARTIES, INCLUDING DEFENDANT DIGITAL HEMISPHERE DEVELOPMENT, LLC, TO COMMUNICATE WITH THIRD PARTIES UNDER ITS DOMAIN FOR MARKETING AND BRANDING RECOGNITION. (SKARLEN REPLY DECL., 8.) THIS INCLUDES COMMUNICATIONS SENT TO PLAINTIFF FROM ANDY CHONG AND JEN MILLER REGARDING THE SUBJECT HOSTING FACILITY. (SCHWING DECL., 3 - 5, EXHIBITS A, B.) HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED EFFECTIVE SERVICE. (CCP 416.10.) ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE, THE PROCESS SERVER SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON "GARY CANN, AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS." (PROOF OF SERVICE, FILED SEPT. 18, 2013, 3B.) HOWEVER, DEFENDANT HAS NOT APPOINTED AN AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT ANDY CHONG IS A "PRESIDENT, CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER, OR OTHER HEAD OF THE CORPORATION, A VICE PRESIDENT, A SECRETARY OR ASSISTANT SECRETARY, A TREASURER OR ASSISTANT TREASURER, A CONTROLLER OR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER, A GENERAL MANAGER, OR A PERSON AUTHORIZED BY THE CORPORATION TO RECEIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS." (CCP 416.10(B).) IN EMAIL CORRESPONDENCE TO PLAINTIFF, MR. CHONG IDENTIFIED HIMSELF AS AN ACCOUNTANT FOR COMMERCEGATE. (SCHWING DECL., EXHIBIT A.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LIMITED'S MOTION TO QUASH IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS ARGUE THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SERVE THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT IN A PROPER FASHION. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION DOES NOT ADDRESS THAT ISSUE, AND ARGUES THAT PLAINTIFF PROPERLY SERVED A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A MOTION TO QUASH REGARDING SERVICE OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KENDAL E. FLETCHER OF LV& S, TEL. NO. 392-2560 EXT. 107 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CHRISTOPER GONZALES OF THE CALIFORNIA LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (818)550-8300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LTD.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LIMITED's MOTION TO QUASH FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied. (CCP 416.10.) Plaintiff has demonstrated that minimum contacts exist between Defendant Commerce Gate Ireland Limited ("Defendant") and the State of California. (CCP 410.10.) On its website, Defendant identified an office located at 501 Santa Monica Blvd., Ste. 506, Santa Monica, CA 90401. (Yaport Decl., Exhibit A.) Further, by its own admission, Defendant permitted other parties, including Defendant Digital Hemisphere Development, LLC, to communicate with third parties under its domain for marketing and branding recognition. (Skarlen Reply Decl., 8.) This includes communications sent to Plaintiff from Andy Chong and Jen Miller regarding the subject hosting facility. (Schwing Decl., 3 - 5, Exhibits A, B.) However, Plaintiff has not demonstrated effective service. (CCP 416.10.) On the proof of service, the process server served by substitute service on "Gary Cann, Agent for Service of Process." (Proof of Service, filed Sept. 18, 2013, 3b.) However, Defendant has not appointed an agent for service of process. Further, Plaintiff has not demonstrated that Andy Chong is a "president, chief executive officer, or other head of the corporation, a vice president, a secretary or assistant secretary, a treasurer or assistant treasurer, a controller or chief financial officer, a general manager, or a person authorized by the corporation to receive service of process." (CCP 416.10(b).) In email correspondence to Plaintiff, Mr. Chong identified himself as an Accountant for CommerceGate. (Schwing Decl., Exhibit A.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA hERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jan-10-2014 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LIMITED'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is continued to February 24, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion To Quash;
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COMMERCEGATE IRELAND LIMITED'S Motion To Quash is off calendar as moot. Defendant's moving papers argue that Plaintiff failed to serve the original Complaint in a proper fashion. Plaintiff's opposition does not address that issue, and argues that Plaintiff properly served a First Amended Complaint. Defendant may file a motion to quash regarding service of the First Amended Complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
